title: Malaysian-Style Chicken Toast
description: A flavorful and aromatic Malaysian-inspired dish featuring crispy toast topped with chicken, spices, and herbs. Perfect as a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Golden yeast extract
ingredients.notes: Available at most Asian grocery stores

instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together yeast extract, 1 tablespoon oil, and 1 tablespoon water. Add chicken and marinate for at least 15 minutes.
3. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange chicken pieces in a single layer. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
4. Meanwhile, toast the bread slices until crispy. Cut into bite-sized pieces.
5. In a small bowl, mix together chili sauce, 1 tablespoon oil, and 1 tablespoon water (if using).
6. Assemble the toast by spreading a layer of chili sauce mixture on each slice, followed by a piece of cooked chicken, and finishing with chopped cilantro.
